name: HAKUA Internal UV Defense Supplement
pros: Exceptional value at ¥1,980—roughly half the price of competitors
Functional food certified with astaxanthin and vitamin C for legitimate UV support
Highest review volume (3,164) and consistent 4.48★ rating shows mass-market trust
cons: Fewer advanced ingredients compared to premium brands; more basic formulation
Functional food designation (not pharmaceutical) means modest efficacy claims
shortDescription: Budget-friendly, functional food–certified UV supplement with astaxanthin—Japan's bestseller.
review: HAKUA is the smart choice for budget-conscious expats who want UV protection without premium pricing. With 3,164 reviews and solid 4.48★ rating, this is Japan's most-purchased internal sunscreen. It's functional food certified (meaning legitimate health claims) and includes astaxanthin and vitamin C. You won't get the advanced formulation of pricier brands, but for daily UV defense on a budget, this delivers real value.
